steps.title: Identify axes
steps.content: The horizontal axis represents molecular weight $x$ (grams per mole) and the vertical axis represents boiling point $y$ (degrees Celsius).

steps.title: Interpret the given point
steps.content:
The point $\left(149.02,186.05\right)$ lies on the graph, so when $x=149.02$ the corresponding $y$ is $186.05$
That means a normal paraffin with a molecular weight of $149.02$ g/mol has an estimated boiling point of $186.05$°C
That confirms B is correct.
